---
name: RFC
about: Propose a substantial ui-audit design or architecture change
title: 'RFC: '
labels: ['rfc', 'design']
assignees: ''
---

## Title

Provide a concise title for the proposal.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this RFC solve? Who is affected by the current behavior or
missing capability?

## Motivation

Why should ui-audit address this now? Describe user impact, maintainer impact,
ecosystem impact, or long-term architectural value.

## Proposal

Describe the proposed design. Include API sketches, configuration examples, data
flow, lifecycle changes, or diagrams where useful.

## Alternatives

What other approaches were considered? Explain the trade-offs and why this
proposal is preferred.

## Expected Impact

Describe the expected impact on users, contributors, maintainers, performance,
security, and future extensibility.

## Backward Compatibility

Does this change preserve existing behavior? If not, describe the migration path
and compatibility risks.

## References

Link related issues, pull requests, discussions, prior RFCs, external designs,
or relevant documentation.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have checked existing RFCs for related decisions.
- [ ] I have separated goals from non-goals.
- [ ] I have described alternatives and trade-offs.
- [ ] I have considered backward compatibility.
- [ ] I have considered performance and security implications.
- [ ] I am prepared to open a documentation pull request if maintainers support
      the proposal.
